programme.title: World of Sport: Petrol Heads
programme.desc: Richard Henwood looks back at archive motorsport action, featuring the likes of James Hunt and Barry Sheene, with a spectacular crash involving Kelvin Burt(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The death of a 15-year-old girl leads Quincy to begin a campaign to ban a lethal chemical used to stimulate plant growth(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: One of Theo's colleagues discovers that an old school friend is involved with fencing the loot from a diamond heist, and decides to exploit his friendship to bring the crooks down(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A governess takes up a new position, but feels constrained to consult Holmes about some of the bizarre conditions stipulated by her employer. Period crime drama, guest starring Natasha Richardson, Joss Ackland and Patience Collier, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur becomes a rebel without a clue by launching a motorbike despatch agency - but Ray is concerned the entire venture is heading for a crash. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle learn an assassin has been hired to murder one of the delegates at an anti-terrorist conference and set about discovering the identity of the killer's target. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A series of damning reports claims police officers are not playing by the book, so Regan poses as an ex-con and heads to a club frequented by two officers suspected of running a protection racket and taking bribes from villains to release them. John Thaw stars(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A racehorse unaccountably goes wild and kills its jockey in full view of Quincy - but an autopsy convinces him the death was murder rather than a freak accident(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo is convinced that the suspects in the murder of a book-keeper are innocent, but his attempts to prove it lead him into conflict with the FBI, who have their own agenda(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An interpreter claims to have been abducted by two villains who forced him to interrogate a badly bruised and obviously distressed Greek captive unable to speak English. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is offered the chance to buy a cheap Daimler, but while trying to locate its dealer's elusive premises is arrested for kerb-crawling. With a gross of red light bulbs in his boot, the evidence seems compelling, and even Ray begins to doubt his uncle's innocence. Nevertheless, the loyal nephew sets out to track down the so-called Goodtime garage to provide corroboration. Lighthearted drama, with George Cole and Gary Webster(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are assigned to protect Cowley's former girlfriend, now a controversial evangelist, from an assassin, but are unaware that the would-be hitman is right under their nose. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A youth is arrested after an elderly money-lender is brutally assaulted and robbed. His mother asks Regan, an old friend, to intervene. Though it is later proved he got a legitimate loan and is innocent of theft, the youngster finds himself being blackmailed after falling foul of some very dangerous individuals. Karl Howman guest stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Angellica Bell, Oritse Williams, Leslie Ash and Ian Lavender pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: Members of the Kerry Mountain Rescue team head to Mangerton mountain after receiving a call about an elderly walker in Killarney National Park who has complained of chest pains. On the Humber estuary, a pleasure boat suffers engine failure and Humber rescue team members speed to its aid while it drifts perilously close to some rocks(n)

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: On Croagh Patrick in Co Mayo, the Mayo Mountain Rescue Team gears up for the annual religious pilgrimage, where up to 30,000 people set out to reach the summit of the mountain. More than 120 volunteers from other rescue teams, the Order of Malta, Civil Defence and Irish Air Corps assist the many injured pilgrims as they fall, have heart attacks and break ankles. On the Kinder Plateau, the Buxton and Kinder Mountain Rescue teams are called to an injured walker, while in the Lake District, three mountain rescue teams attend an injured ice climber with spinal and head injuries(n)

programme.title: Fighter Pilot: The Real Top Gun
programme.desc: Documentary following three trainees at Britain's elite fighter pilot school, including the establishment's only female student. In the first episode, the pilots are put through their paces learning to fly the new F35 Lightning stealth jet. These planes can avoid radar, hover and land vertically, but with only a few months to bring them to the UK and prepare them for active service, the stakes a re high for the aspiring pilots(n)

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: The Professionals

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A youth is arrested after an elderly money-lender is brutally assaulted and robbed. His mother asks Regan, an old friend, to intervene. Karl Howman guest stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur swaps the contents of his lock-up for a slot-machine full of stolen money during a trip to the fair. programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle is given a deadly new rifle for testing, but the weapon is promptly stolen. programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan gets caught in the crossfire between the family of a recently deceased gangland leader and the members of the late man's crime syndicate, regarding the division of the hoodlum's wealth. Hywel Bennett guest stars, with John Thaw(n)

programme.title: Car Crash Global: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Documentary featuring dash-cam video footage of a host of astonishing accidents, spectacular smashes and enthralling escapes from the roads of Russia and Colombia(n)

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers
programme.desc: Biologist, extreme angler and naturalist Jeremy Wade heads to the Amazon. Together with its tributaries, it contains an incredible 20 per cent of Earth's fresh water, and the immense forests it sustains generate a quarter of the oxygen needed for life on the planet. Disgorging more water than the next nine biggest rivers combined, this waterway is indeed a mighty affair. By tracing the epic migration of the dorado catfish, Jeremy discovers the issues putting this great river at risk - from leaking pipelines to giant dams. However, he also discovers tales of surprising hope(n)

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Riggs and Murtaugh respond to a noise complaint at a party at a heavyweight boxer Hollywood hills home. When gunshots go off, they are drawn into a more important case involving illegal gun-runners with advanced military technology. Riggs becomes personally invested in matters when he discovers one of their targets is a pregnant woman who reminds him of his late wife. Meanwhile, Trish worries about Murtaugh's health, as his partnership with Riggs tests his limits. Clayne Crawford and Damon Wayans star(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Sam and Quincy are sent to a Caribbean island, where an American-manufactured anti-diphtheria drug has apparently begun claiming the lives of the people it is supposed to protect(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo discovers that a series of car thefts are part of a scam, with victims allowing their cars to be stolen so they can claim insurance. Guest starring David Ogden Stiers (MASH)(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A doctor visits Holmes on behalf of his friend and sponsor Blessington, a nervous invalid whose fragile peace of mind has been thrown into turmoil by a series of mysterious events. Drama, guest starring Patrick Newell and Nicholas Clay, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A face from the past spreads stories that cause Arthur and Dave to fall out, and the camel-coated entrepreneur opens a rival establishment to the Winchester Club. However, Ray harbours doubts concerning the instigator's honesty. George Cole, Gary Webster and Glynn Edwards star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The brother of a suspected drug-dealer dies while in custody, and his elder sibling directs his powerful lawyer to instigate a committee to investigate CI5's involvement. With the future of the division in question, Bodie and Doyle try to prove the family's drug-trade connection and the real reason behind the man's death. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. He disapproves of his daughter's villainous boyfriend, and Regan suspects he is being exploited to help break the romantic union. However, an even darker plan is being hatched, with the daughter an innocent pawn in a robbery. Kenny Lynch and Derek Francis guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Todd Carty, Jo Pavey, Saira Khan and Dominic Holland pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove buy and transform a BSA Bantam from a humble roadster into a trial bike. However, they soon discover it is far easier to restore than it is to sell(n)

programme.title: Billy Connolly's Great American Trail
programme.desc: The comedian embarks on a journey across the US, following the migratory trail of the Scots through America - starting in New York and finishing in Nashville, Tennessee. The first episode sees Billy open the New York Tartan Day parade in front of a 30,000-strong crowd. He then heads to Plymouth, Massachusetts, where the pilgrims first landed on American soil, followed by a meeting with the Native American tribe who almost had their people and language wiped out(n)

programme.title: The Nice Guys (2016)
programme.desc: A private detective investigates the murder of a porn star in 1970s Los Angeles, only to run into a hired thug employed to scare him off. However, the mysterious disappearance of a woman connected to the case forces the unlikely duo to work together, leading them to uncover a government conspiracy. Crime comedy, starring Russell Crowe and Ryan Gosling(n)

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: Members of the Kerry Mountain Rescue team head to Mangerton mountain after receiving a call about an elderly walker in Killarney National Park who has complained of chest pains. On the Humber estuary, a pleasure boat suffers engine failure and Humber rescue team members speed to its aid while it drifts perilously close to some rocks(n)

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: On Croagh Patrick in Co Mayo, the Mayo Mountain Rescue Team gears up for the annual religious pilgrimage, where up to 30,000 people set out to reach the summit of the mountain. More than 120 volunteers from other rescue teams, the Order of Malta, Civil Defence and Irish Air Corps assist the many injured pilgrims as they fall, have heart attacks and break ankles. On the Kinder Plateau, the Buxton and Kinder Mountain Rescue teams are called to an injured walker, while in the Lake District, three mountain rescue teams attend an injured ice climber with spinal and head injuries(n)

programme.title: Fighter Pilot: The Real Top Gun
programme.desc: Documentary following three trainees at Britain's elite fighter pilot school, including the establishment's only female student. programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan gets caught in the crossfire between the family of a recently deceased gangland leader and the members of the late man's crime syndicate, regarding the division of the hoodlum's wealth. The hitherto innocent son manages to play-off his parent's ex-cohorts against one another with increasing dexterity and appears only too keen to pick up the duplicitous traits of his late father. Hywel Bennett guest stars, with John Thaw(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Sam and Quincy are sent to a Caribbean island, where an American-manufactured anti-diphtheria drug has apparently begun claiming the lives of the people it is supposed to protect(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo discovers that a series of car thefts are part of a scam, with victims allowing their cars to be stolen so they can claim insurance. Guest starring David Ogden Stiers (MASH)(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A doctor visits Holmes on behalf of his friend and sponsor Blessington, a nervous invalid whose fragile peace of mind has been thrown into turmoil by a series of mysterious events. Drama, guest starring Patrick Newell and Nicholas Clay, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A face from the past spreads stories that cause Arthur and Dave to fall out, and the camel-coated entrepreneur opens a rival establishment to the Winchester Club. However, Ray harbours doubts concerning the instigator's honesty. George Cole, Gary Webster and Glynn Edwards star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The brother of a suspected drug-dealer dies while in custody, and his elder sibling directs his powerful lawyer to instigate a committee to investigate CI5's involvement. With the future of the division in question, Bodie and Doyle try to prove the family's drug-trade connection and the real reason behind the man's death. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. He disapproves of his daughter's villainous boyfriend, and Regan suspects he is being exploited to help break the romantic union. However, an even darker plan is being hatched, with the daughter an innocent pawn in a robbery. Kenny Lynch and Derek Francis guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Todd Carty, Jo Pavey, Saira Khan and Dominic Holland pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove buy and transform a BSA Bantam from a humble roadster into a trial bike. However, they soon discover it is far easier to restore than it is to sell(n)

programme.title: Billy Connolly's Great American Trail
programme.desc: The comedian embarks on a journey across the US, following the migratory trail of the Scots through America - starting in New York and finishing in Nashville, Tennessee. The first episode sees Billy open the New York Tartan Day parade in front of a 30,000-strong crowd. He then heads to Plymouth, Massachusetts, where the pilgrims first landed on American soil, followed by a meeting with the Native American tribe who almost had their people and language wiped out(n)

programme.title: The Nice Guys (2016)
programme.desc: A private detective investigates the murder of a porn star in 1970s Los Angeles, only to run into a hired thug employed to scare him off. However, the mysterious disappearance of a woman connected to the case forces the unlikely duo to work together, leading them to uncover a government conspiracy. Crime comedy, starring Russell Crowe and Ryan Gosling(n)

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: When elderly teacher Peter Farquhar was found dead at home in the village of Maids Moreton in 2015, it was sad and unexpected, but no one thought it suspicious. But 18 months later, when his neighbour Ann Moore-Martin also fell ill and died, the police decided to look again. They found that Ben Field, a would-be vicar and academic, had recently become part of both of their lives and benefited from their wills. This programme shows that by delving back in time through friends' and loved ones' memories of Peter and Ben's relationship, as well as Peter's diary, the police discovered a story of love and betrayal(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction

programme.title: Naked Beach

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point(n)

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The 22 remaining recruits, including a mole who is an undercover DS, are sent deeper into the epic and unforgiving terrain of the Isle of Raasay in the Scottish Highlands, to see if they have the mental and physical robustness required to pass this unique version of SAS selection. This stage of the course sees the exodus of four of the recruits as the ex-special forces' instructors push them to control their aggression. For the first time ever, the recruits are trained in firing a gun and when to use this against a potential threat, and pitted against each other in hand-to-hand combat(n)

programme.desc: The programme celebrates the great British breakfast with a look back at some of the UK's favourite brekkie-based investigations, including when Jimmy Doherty traced the roots of baked beans back to the early settlers in America, and solved the puzzle of what kippers actually are. programme.title: How to Steal Pigs and Influence People

They enjoy hundreds of thousands of followers and know exactly what it takes to make an impact online(n)

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: When elderly teacher Peter Farquhar was found dead at home in the village of Maids Moreton in 2015, it was sad and unexpected, but no one thought it suspicious. But 18 months later, when his neighbour Ann Moore-Martin also fell ill and died, the police decided to look again. They found that Ben Field, a would-be vicar and academic, had recently become part of both of their lives and benefited from their wills. This programme shows that by delving back in time through friends' and loved ones' memories of Peter and Ben's relationship, as well as Peter's diary, the police discovered a story of love and betrayal(n)

Cynthia, Sam and their daughters find their chicken guests highly entertaining, while Dawn, John, Max and Sam look after two piglets - and as they learn more about pig intelligence they research more about the health implications of processed meat, forcing them to question their entire attitude to what they eat(n)

programme.title: Extraordinary People

programme.title: Inside the World's Greatest Hotels

programme.title: Red Arrows Take America
programme.desc: The famous squadron are in Canada preparing for the first public display of their American tour and a special show organised in Gatineau, Quebec. The group continue their journey down the east coast and arrive in Chicago, where they will be watched by over two million people, before finally reaching Washington DC, where they perform a flypast over the Washington Nationals baseball stadium(n)

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Homeless
programme.desc: Six young privileged Brits, who believe that homelessness is often the result of the victim's own actions, agree to live on the streets of London for three nights. They include 23-year-old Kieren, who plans to beg to raise money that he will invest in umbrellas. On his first night he only makes £5, and finds a place under the arches near Trafalgar Square to bed down. Woken up by security, Kieren begs for several more hours until he makes enough to stay in a hostel(n)

programme.title: Big Family Values: More Kids Than Cash
programme.desc: A family of 10 from Essex receive some troubling financial news and a home-schooling single mum of seven has to hold down two part-time jobs to make ends meet. Plus, the childhood sweethearts uprooting their seven kids for pastures new in a bid to save money(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Comedy-drama about two chancers, Andy, who is Deaf, and Jez, hearing, who are broke and living in a van. After their other ideas fail, they dream up what they think is the perfect get-rich-quick scheme(n)

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe on Mars (1964)
programme.desc: Stranded on Mars with only a monkey as a companion, an astronaut has to quickly figure out how to survive a lack of oxygen, food and water on the lifeless planet. Sci-fi drama, inspired by Daniel Defoe's classic tale, starring Paul Mantee, Adam West and Victor Lundin(n)

programme.title: The Flight of the Phoenix (1965)
programme.desc: A plane crashes in the blazing heat of the desert - and as time passes, the crew and passengers realise their only chance of making it through the ordeal alive is to repair the badly damaged craft. Adventure, starring James Stewart, Richard Attenborough, Peter Finch and Ernest Borgnine(n)

programme.title: The Professionals (1966)
programme.desc: A wealthy Texan hires four mercenaries to rescue his wife, who has been abducted and taken to Mexico by a bandit gang. However, when they find her, she refuses to leave and they have to take her by force - ending in a cross-border chase with the outlaws on their trail. Western adventure, with Burt Lancaster, Lee Marvin, Robert Ryan, Woody Strode, Jack Palance and Claudia Cardinale(n)

programme.title: Beautiful Creatures (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager falls in love with a new girl in his school, only to discover she is a witch. As dark secrets from her family's past emerge, they discover that on her 16th birthday, she will be required to choose a side in a conflict between good and evil. Fantasy based on Kami Garcia's novel, starring Alden Ehrenreich, Alice Englert, Jeremy Irons and Emma Thompson(n)

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)
programme.desc: The sewer-dwelling heroes discover their arch enemy Shredder has returned from another dimension, and made a deal with an alien warlord. Assisted by two mutant henchman, Shredder goes in search of a lost device that will allow his new ally to mount an invasion of Earth. Action adventure sequel, starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett and Stephen Amell(n)

programme.title: Horns (2013)
programme.desc: A man who has become an outcast after being accused of murdering his own girlfriend wakes up one morning to find he has grown horns. He discovers he now has the power to compel people to confess their sins or act on their darkest desires, and uses his supernatural gifts to expose the real killer. Horror based on Joe Hill's novel, starring Daniel Radcliffe and Juno Temple(n)

programme.title: A.C.O.D. (2013)
programme.desc: A man is forced to relive his parents' acrimonious divorce when his younger brother announces he is getting married. The older son tries to persuade his parents and their new spouses to put aside their past conflicts and attend the wedding together, bringing back tense memories for everyone. Comedy, starring Adam Scott, Catherine O'Hara and Richard Jenkins(n)

programme.title: Only the Valiant (1951)
programme.desc: A tough cavalry officer selects six unlikely comrades to undertake a vital mission to defend an isolated fort against marauding Apaches. His men's initial hostility soon turns to respect, however, as they realise his wily ways will see them through the conflict. Western adventure based on a novel by Charles Marquis Warren, starring Gregory Peck, Barbara Payton, Ward Bond and Lon Chaney Jr(n)

programme.title: Blanche Fury (1948)
programme.desc: A penniless governess is invited to stay with a wealthy relative, where she hopes to secure her future and take over the estate by marrying her infatuated cousin. However, her secret romance with a stablehand has tragic consequences for all concerned. Drama, starring Valerie Hobson, Michael Gough, Stewart Granger and Walter Fitzgerald(n)

programme.title: Three Faces West (1940)
programme.desc: An Austrian doctor and his daughter arrive in the dust bowl regions of America after fleeing the Nazis, and join the exodus of farmers seeking fertile land in Oregon. The daughter falls for the pioneer leading the journey, despite being engaged to the man who helped her escape the Third Reich. Drama, starring John Wayne, Charles Coburn and Sigrid Gurie(n)

programme.title: The Undefeated (1969)
programme.desc: A veteran Union officer crosses paths again with a former Confederate enemy years after the end of the Civil War - and their past animosity resurfaces. However, when a Mexican general takes the ex-Confederate and his men hostage, the old Union soldier debates whether to surrender his herd of horses by way of ransom. Western, with John Wayne, Rock Hudson, Lee Meriwether, Tony Aguilar and Roman Gabriel(n)

programme.title: Ride Along (2014)
programme.desc: A wannabe police officer persuades his girlfriend's tough detective brother to take him along on duty. The cop hopes to scare his unwanted partner away from his sister by exposing him to danger - but needs some help when the patrol leads to a run-in with the city's most wanted criminal. Comedy, starring Ice Cube, Kevin Hart and Laurence Fishburne(n)

programme.title: The Hatton Garden Job (2017)
programme.desc: A ragtag group of career criminals plot an audacious, multi-million-pound raid on an underground facility in London. True-life crime drama, with Stephen Moyer, Larry Lamb and Matthew Goode(n)

programme.title: Men, Women & Children (2014)
programme.desc: Four teenagers and their parents struggle to deal with the complicated ways in which modern technology has affected their lives and how they communicate. Issues such as celebrity, pornography and eating disorders put all their relationships to the test. Ensemble drama, starring Adam Sandler and Jennifer Garner(n)

programme.title: Middle Men (2009)
programme.desc: Two men approach a slick businessman to help them put together the first porn website on the internet. He comes up with grander plans than they had ever envisaged and soon the money is rolling in. However, with success comes the unwanted attention of the FBI, conmen, corrupt politicians and Russian gangsters. Fact-based comedy drama, with Luke Wilson, Giovanni Ribisi and Gabriel Macht(n)

programme.title: Hondo (1953)
programme.desc: A hard-boiled cavalry scout with a feral dog as companion stumbles across a woman and her child stranded on their homestead deep inside hostile territory. Despite repeated attacks by the Apaches, they refuse to leave their home, leaving the scout with no choice but to stay and defend her. Western, starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond and Michael Pate(n)

programme.title: Heaven Knows, Mr Allison (1957)
programme.desc: A US marine corporal stationed on a South Pacific island and a novice nun on a mission are forced into the hills when Japanese forces arrive and set up military bases during the Second World War. Before long the pair develop strong emotional ties, but in resisting their feelings for each other the relationship becomes one of deep mutual respect. Romantic drama, written and directed by John Huston, with Robert Mitchum and Deborah Kerr(n)

programme.title: Freedom Radio (1940)
programme.desc: A Viennese doctor tries to maintain business as usual while living under Nazi rule. However, events take a sickening turn when his wife begins wholeheartedly espousing Hitler's views - prompting him to start broadcasting Allied propaganda from a secret transmitter. Second World War drama, starring Clive Brook, Diana Wynyard, Raymond Huntley and Derek Farr(n)

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri (1954)

Adventure, starring William Holden, Grace Kelly, Fredric March and Mickey Rooney(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host Dessert Week as the baking contest crosses the half-way point. The signature challenge is an elegant and challenging bake with a lot of delicate layers, while the technical round will test the bakers' ability to pull off delicate assembly and precise decoration. Finally, for the Showstopper, they must create a spherical celebration cake. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be crowned Star Baker and who will be leaving the tent this week(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.desc: Simon O'Brien recycles some historic oak while Henry Cole comes unstuck when he tries to get to grips with an old Ford Escort(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Bell House Hotel in Wiltshire, where business partners Chris Williams and Jacqui Hogg hope guests will appreciate their attempts to bring London chic to the shires. Susan and David Speak are frustrated by the low shower pressure, while Jade Hendon butts heads with Matthew over healthy eating at dinner and the hosts' absence at breakfast the next morning gets the criticism flowing(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Partridge in Oxfordshire, where young couple Matthew Cockman and Paula Szkwarkowska hope guests will get on board with their passion for local organic food. A communal bathroom has the guests lost for words, and the lack of a hot breakfast included in the price leaves a bad taste in everyone's mouths(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Strawberry Gardens B&B in Heysham for the third day of the contest, where husband and wife team Susan and David Speak offer home-from-home accommodation and an abundance of northern hospitality. Sports enthusiast David treats his guests to a traditional darts competition, adjudicated by former world champion Alan Warriner-Little, but he is unimpressed when Paula sends back her evening meal. However, it is Chris and Jacqui's feedback that disappoints the hosts the most(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Bateman's Mill near Chesterfield, where manager Jade Hendon has high hopes of being the best. But she faces an uphill battle when David and Susan go out of their way to find hairs in the bathroom - and to make mattters worse, her Derbyshire breakfast is not a hit with Chris and Jacqui(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores, starting with Chris and Jacqui, owners of the Bell House, who want to find out why Matthew marked them down for being 'too tall' for his bed. The group members proceed to thrash out their differences before the week's winners are revealed(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: With numbers in the wild dwindling rapidly, Chester Zoo's black rhino breeding programme is a key part of preserving the species. Black rhino Kitani is introduced to new mate Magadi, but with injury a high risk during mating, keeper Babs is concerned that Kitani may struggle to defend herself, since she lost her horn after the death of her calf. Meanwhile, there's a surprise birth in the orangutan house, and older sibling Tuti has to fend for herself and set out on the road to independence(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Lauren and Christian Grant in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, who are unsure whether to sell or upgrade their house. Christian dreams of a home bursting with character, but Lauren thinks that they can refurbish their four-bedroom detached property to make it more suitable for them and their two small children(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend lead a team of experts who secretly restore classic cars for their unsuspecting owners. They begin by coming to the aid of a bricklayer whose 1986 Ford Sierra RS Cosworth was neglected after a family tragedy(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As Dick and Angel prepare for winter, they attend a food festival in Rouen, where they hope to find inspiration over what to do with their fresh fruit and vegetables. Angel adds the finishing touches to the floating geodesic dome in time for a family sleepover, while Dick gets to work fixing the crumbling stucco(n)

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: In the last series, Howard Evans and Prue Chiles helped reworked midwife Mandy's 1980s house, transforming the ugly exterior and first-floor living area. Now George revisits Nottingham's Park Estate to find out if Mandy has managed to complete the transformation and make the ground floor equally as spectacular(n)

programme.title: The Green Mile (1999)
programme.desc: A convicted child-killer of towering height and massive build is condemned to death row, but astonishes the guards with his good nature and miraculous healing powers. They believe the gentle giant is incapable of crime, and emotions run high as they realise there is no hope of overturning his death sentence. Supernatural drama, based on a novel by Stephen King, starring Tom Hanks, Michael Clarke Duncan, David Morse and Harry Dean Stanton(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The return of the programme following life at the A&E department of St George's hospital in south-west London. Doctors suspect a blood clot when David, 69, is rushed in with severe leg pain and a pale foot, and vascular specialists are called to assess him for surgery to save his leg. Annie, 90, has been brought in after struggling to breathe at home. Her daughter Francesca and granddaughter Tamara wait by her side in resus, as doctors battle to uncover the cause of shadowing on her lungs(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chef's attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentist's waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Susan Peters from Dorchester, Dorset, has her heart set on moving to stunning Mallorca. Armed with a £130,000 budget and with best friend Tina to help her with the decision, Scarlette Douglas shows her five properties on the island(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Wendy Tyler has long dreamed of living in Spain and recently found a job in Benidorm. Danni Menzies shows Wendy and her best friend Diana five properties for her budget of £70,000, but it remains to be seen which she will consider to be the final piece of the jigsaw(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host a special festival-themed round of the culinary competition. The episode kicks off with a signature challenge in which the bakers must draw inspiration from celebrations across the world. Moving on to the technical round, the contestants find the makings of a classic deep-fried Italian dish lurking beneath the mysterious gingham cloths. Finally, the Showstopper puts the bakers' precision and creativity to the test before judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith decide who will be crowned StarBaker(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole gives Simon O'Brien a motorcycling masterclass in Wiltshire as the duo seek more items to fix up and sell on to make profits for their owners(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit the Cotswolds and Somerset, where finds include a set of milk churns and an old munitions shell(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at David and Ewa Woodward's Keats Cottage in Shanklin on the Isle of Wight. In the rooms, Donna Taylor from Jasmine House in Leicestershire makes a hair-raising discovery, while mother-and-daughter team Lesley and Chloe Priestly take a dislike to one of their competitors at dinner(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Jasmine House in Lutterworth, Leicestershire managed by Donna Taylor who believes in a no frills approach. But it doesn't take long for Martin and Sara to realise all the added extras in the room don't add up. During the afternoon Leslie and Chloe show their fighting spirit during a kickboxing lesson and all the B&Bers square up to their host(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the luxury Halliwell House in Cheshire for the third day of the contest, where owners Martin Hulme and Sara Williams charge nearly £500 per night. Donna is astonished at the room rates, while David and Ewa are expecting nothing but perfection, but the self-service approach at breakfast confuses the guests, leaving Martin and Sara defiant in the face of their feedback(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final two days see the contestants staying the night at Soar Chapel Guest House in Ebbw Vale, the family home of mum and daughter Lesley and Chloe Priestly. Expectations are high for this duo and one guest in particular is not disappointed. Things get going in the afternoon during a beatboxing contest, although old tensions resurface at dinner and the hosts are left to calm things down. A massive spread is laid on at breakfast, but when one guest takes issue with the cooked items, Lesley and Chloe worry what impact it will have come payment day(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. David and Ewa Woodward want to challenge Martin's criticism over the way they run their business. Next, Donna Taylor wants to find out more about the issue that caused Martin and Sara to lose sleep. Needless to say, there is tension in the air and axes to grind, before the winner is revealed(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Florence and Nadine, two of Chester's Grevy's zebras, are about to give birth, but other animals are struggling to produce offspring, including Iblis the Asiatic lion. Meanwhile, warthog dad Magnum is feeling the pressure of parenting as two of his older children, Dobby and Neville, are becoming increasingly hard to control, and Magnum is losing his hair with the stress(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Christine Attwood and Tony Congdon in Purley, Croydon, who need help deciding whether they should sell or upgrade their home. The pair have been going back and forth for almost a decade about the future of their unusual bungalow - Tony loves the property and its location, but Christine longs to move closer to the coast to enjoy her retirement(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend lead a team of experts as they attempt to renovate a Volkswagen Beetle that has spent many years rusting in a garage(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree enter their fifth year of living in France. With more weddings and events booked in than ever, the couple prepare for their busiest year yet. In order to feed a total of 1,500 guests, Dick and Angel begin renovating the back of the basement, creating a brand new, state-of-the-art events kitchen. Engineer Dick faces a complicated plumbing issue and there's a kitchen design challenge for Angel(n)

programme.title: Guy Martin: Last Flight of the Vulcan Bomber
programme.desc: The mechanic joins a select crew of engineers working to prepare the last Vulcan bomber that is capable of flight for a farewell tour of the UK. The programme features contributions from former crew members, who recall its service in conflicts from the 1950s to the Falklands, as well as serving as Britain's nuclear deterrent(n)

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Melanie Sykes hosts as 12 amateur potters compete against one another, with judges Keith Brymer Jones and Sue Pryke asking the contenders to throw a breakfast set and then egg cups(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients whose visions of the world are rocked by life-changing events, including 44-year-old Sergio, who is flown in by air ambulance after a cycling accident. Another cyclist - 71-year-old Alan - arrives in resus after being in a collision with a van. Doctors suspect a head injury and multiple fractures. Alan's wife Jenny reveals how she met him and how a sudden accident involving her son burst their idyll and took their lives on an unexpected path(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A visitor to a horse fair in Cumbria needs emergency intervention after a cardiac arrest, and a man is found in a state of confusion after a fall in the County Durham countryside(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bob's in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters aren't improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before it's too late(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients whose visions of the world are rocked by life-changing events, including 44-year-old Sergio, who is flown in by air ambulance after a cycling accident. Another cyclist - 71-year-old Alan - arrives in resus after being in a collision with a van. Doctors suspect a head injury and multiple fractures. Alan's wife Jenny reveals how she met him and how a sudden accident involving her son burst their idyll and took their lives on an unexpected path(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Lea and Tony Desborough from Essex have fallen in love with Menorca on countless holidays over the last 20 years, and have dreamed of owning their own place there. Now, as they wind down their work commitments, they've decided it's time to make that dream a reality. Laura Hamilton shows them five costal villas for their £250,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Phil and Caroline Mansell from Wales have been holidaying together in the La Marina Alta region of Spain's Costa Blanca for years. Phil, who suffers from severe arthritis, finds the climate helps his symptoms so they are selling their home back in the UK and are planning a full-time move. Ben Hillman shows them five properties for their £100,000 budget, but will any of them be their dream home?(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host as the remaining bakers' knowledge of pastry is tested. The Signature challenge is a savoury take on a French classic, there's a multi-layered Moroccan Technical, and a towering Showstopper that requires not only an expertise with pastry, but also a solid grasp of structural engineering. With a place in the semi-final at stake, who will win the coveted Star Baker title from judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood?(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien discover items in Wensleydale, North Yorkshire, that are ready for upcycling to turn a profit for their owners(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien assess sewing machines in Kent as they continue their journey across the UK to find unique and valuable items 'lost' in people's homes(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Callum Hogg and Lauren Abraham's modern Park Hotel in Gloucestershire, where sisters Sue Lewis and Wendy Germann are impressed by the colourful decor, but it's not an opinion held by all. The guests are not impressed with having to pay extra for breakfast and Callum and Lauren are faced with robust feedback that leaves them wanting answers and thinking not everyone is being fair(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Trowbridge in Wiltshire to Sue's B&B, which is run by Sue Lewis and her sister, Wendy Germann. Breakfast at the communal table has its awkward moments and Sue is under pressure, having never cooked for so many before. However, it's the feedback that leaves the hosts wondering if maybe some of the guests have not been that straightforward(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to The Talbot in Iwerne Minster, Dorset for the third day of the competition, where hosts Erika Watt and Ellie Gill greet their guests. The rooms do not live up to their good first impression and Callum and Lauren are quick to find fault. At breakfast, tensions simmer as Wendy calls Cameron a creep, and at feedback, some of the comments send Erika and Ellie into fits of giggles(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth visit of the week is to The Old Rectory in Llangattock, south Wales, where young hotel manager Cameron Thomas likes to keep things professional. Despite wanting to find fault, Lauren and Callum are soon to admit their bridal suite is top notch, but Erika and Ellie think there may be some cleaning issues. During an afternoon of canoe racing the group members show their competitive sides(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores. The Park Hotel in Gloucestershire is up first as owners Callum Hogg and Lauren Abraham want to get to the bottom of why Cameron didn't sleep soundly. Next, Sue Lewis from Sue's B&B seeks to discover the deasons for Callum and Lauren's low score for the cleanliness. When all issues are resolved, the winning establishment is revealed(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. Kendari the babirusa - a bizarre-looking creature also known as a deer-pig - is trying to give birth, but is being disturbed by a couple of mischievous otters. Young male orang-utan Willie struggles to impress the females, while Raz the aye-aye, a rare nocturnal primate related to lemurs, is being encouraged to share his home with two jumping rats(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Olliers from Stenhousemuir in Scotland, where husband and wife Steven and Mhairi are undecided whether to sell their home or renovate it. Kirstie produces a plan that revolutionises the whole house, while Phil is tasked to find them a home that's a short throw away from their beloved cricket club(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend lead a team of experts as they attempt to renovate a US army Jeep that survived the Second World War but was later damaged in an arson attack. They hope a rapid turnaround on the vehicle will dazzle and surprise its current owner, Dick Masters(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: It's springtime at the chateau, and with the wedding season just a few weeks away, completing phase two of the basement project is becoming an urgent priority for Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree. To cater for all their summer guests, a much-needed utility and laundry room is about to be plumbed in. Angel comes up with a unique way of preserving the 150-year-old wallpaper, while Dick wrestles with a rake while working on the meadow(n)

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The eleven remaining potters are tasked with hand-building an elaborate chess set and throwing miniature vases at the wheel. Hosted by Melanie Sykes(n)

programme.title: My Grandparents' War
programme.desc: Actor and peace campaigner Mark Rylance finds out what happened to his grandfather Osmond Skinner during the Second World War, a man who spent almost four years as a Japanese prisoner of war. Mark uncovers how his grandfather bravely joined the Hong Kong Volunteer Defence Force with no military training, before being shot on Christmas Day and taken as a prisoner of war. Throughout the programme, Rylance find his views on war tested as he uncovers the real and shocking truth about his grandfather's wartime experience(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maureen, who's 66, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe through her tracheostomy. Nurse Christine battles to clear her airway, while Maureen's husband Preston waits in the relatives' room. As doctors carry out further investigations, Preston joins Maureen and it's revealed how their world was turned upside down when Maureen was diagnosed with the neurological condition multiple system atrophy. Ten-year-old Ryan is brought into resus having fallen at school and suffered internal bleeding(n)

Plus, the McLaren MP4-12C is compared with its supercar rival the Ferrari 458 Italia, and four-time Formula One world champion Sebastian Vettel is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The trio try to make train travel cheaper, faster and more interesting, replacing the locomotive with a specially modified car and the carriages with a series of caravans. Comedy star Rowan Atkinson gets behind the wheel of the Reasonably Priced Car and Jeremy Clarkson drives the Jaguar XKR-S and a Nissan GT-R round the track to compare both models(n)

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Sin City Motors
programme.desc: Major body work is needed when the suspension and engine don't fit the Haunted Rod. Steve flips a 1920 Old Wayne Gas Pump to offset extra labour costs(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May compete in a 1950s-style race from London to Edinburgh. On the footplate of the A1 Tornado steam train, Jeremy has to feed the boiler with a constant supply of coal, while Richard braves the saddle of a Vincent Black Shadow motorbike and James drives an old Jaguar XK120 as the trio discover what Top Gear might have been like 60 years ago. Michael Schumacher drives the Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: Steve and Tim head up the night shift as they deal with an array of inebriated locals in Burton. Documentary series following the work of the Staffordshire Police force(n)

programme.title: Sin City Motors
programme.desc: Steve faces his toughest challenge yet when he must design a tour bus that represents WelderUp while meeting the high standards of his business partners(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond, Jeremy Clarkson and James May try to find the perfect car for 17-year-olds, dealing with insurance companies, accident repairs and a muddy music festival car park in the process. Richard also visits Abu Dhabi to test the Lamborghini Murcielago SV and stages a race between the 1000hp Bugatti Veyron and the McLaren F1. Actor, writer and comedian Stephen Fry is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters find three small cars at an affordable price - a task that involves pestering bankers, harnessing large dogs and almost getting arrested. James May meets American rally driver Ken Block, and Jeremy Clarkson tests out the Mercedes SL Black. Comedian Michael McIntyre is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Josh Widdicombe, Susan Calman and Rich Hall join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig for an extended episode on the theme of 'Origins and Openings'. During the course of the show, the panellists find out an assortment of facts, including what Mr First thought of Mr Second. As ever, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window, as the fiendishly difficult questions lead to points being awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting, as opposed to correct(n)

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Angela Scanlon, Clive Myrie, Sara Pascoe and Rick Edwards continue to test their general knowledge skills in a variety of entertaining trivia-based games(n)

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Sports commentator Clare Balding, Radio 1 DJ Nick Grimshaw and comedians Rhod Gilbert and Rob Delaney join forces with team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the panel show in which participants attempt to deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon(n)

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: TV presenter Richard Hammond, tennis coach Judy Murray and comedians Sean Lock and Trevor Noah join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show in which participants attempt to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Hosted by Rob Brydon(n)

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert plays host for another dose of stand-up from the Hammersmith Apollo in London, warming up the audience before introducing routines by 8 Out of 10 Cats panellist Jon Richardson and actress and comedienne Kerry Godliman(n)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Beach balls, water and sand contribute to a seaside feel to this episode, a jolly tone that is interrupted when Greg Davies deals with the questionable actions of one contestant(n)

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts another round of the peculiar panel quiz and asks a range of unusual questions about journeys, finding out how much Rob Brydon, Phill Jupitus, Cal Wilson and regular panellist Alan Davies know about the subject(n)

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Katy Brand, Sue Perkins and David Mitchell join regular panellist Alan Davies to answer Stephen Fry's obscure questions about people whose names begin with 'J'(n)

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The team discover how the combination of increased leisure time and affordable rail transport brought a new kind of freedom for working-class Victorians. Ruth Goodman travels along the south Devon coast from Paignton to Kingswear, where she helps prepare a paddle steamer for a journey up the River Dart, while at Swanage, Peter Ginn finds out what it was like to work on the excursion trains and the impact mass tourism had on the area(n)

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A look at the Airbus A380, which as the largest passenger plane ever built can carry more than 850 people non-stop nearly half-way around the world. With the largest wingspan of any commercial aircraft and four specially developed mighty turbo jet engines, the A380 weighs 560 tonnes and getting it off the ground would not have been possible without the work of past innovators such as George Cayley and Frank Whittle. Key developments in aerospace engineering - from Richard Whitcombe's energy-efficient wing-tip designs to Nasa engineers' cutting-edge control system, Fly by Wire - helped bring the A380 to fruition(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: How Europe's most advanced power station became a film set. Plus, the structures made by scientific pioneer Nikola Tesla in his quest to provide the US with free electricity(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this documentary chronicling events leading up to the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbour on December 7, 1941, and the subsequent collapse of unprepared British forces before the advancing enemy in Singapore. Includes interviews with veterans from both sides(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston travels to Jerusalem in search of Solomon's Temple. When the Romans sacked the city in 70AD, the fabled Treasure of Solomons was believed to have been looted and taken back to Rome. However, it is possible it was hidden away by the High Priests. Archaeologists Dr Shimon Gibson and Kate Raphael have dedicated their lives working out what actually happened, and discuss whether it is possible that Solomonic and Roman treasures lie undiscovered under Jerusalem(n)

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A look at the Airbus A380, which as the largest passenger plane ever built can carry more than 850 people non-stop nearly half-way around the world. With the largest wingspan of any commercial aircraft and four specially developed mighty turbo jet engines, the A380 weighs 560 tonnes and getting it off the ground would not have been possible without the work of past innovators such as George Cayley and Frank Whittle. Key developments in aerospace engineering - from Richard Whitcombe's energy-efficient wing-tip designs to Nasa engineers' cutting-edge control system, Fly by Wire - helped bring the A380 to fruition(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson hikes up from Lyme Regis on Dorset's Jurassic Coast to the Somerset Levels in the footsteps of a ragtag rebel army led by the young Duke of Monmouth, the illegitimate son of Charles II. He sailed in from Holland around Lyme's famous Cobb with a handful of soldiers, believing the people would support him in overthrowing the newly crowned James II, who was also Monmouth's uncle, but, more importantly, Roman Catholic. The year was 1685 and the country was riven by anti-Catholic feeling mixed up with revolutionary zeal. Monmouth marched through the fiercely independent towns of Devon, gathering support from artisans and farmworkers. Meeting up with Billy Bragg in Colyton, Tony learns about the kind of people prepared to risk their lives for the Monmouth Rebellion(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston talks to author Joy Hancox about the alchemical roots of London, the design of famous buildings such as The Globe theatre and the mysterious figure of English poet John Byrom. He also meets a modern day potion-maker(n)

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Veteran naturalist David Attenborough explores the fragile marine ecosystem of the coral reef, where all creatures, including the corals themselves, have to fight for survival. From tiny beginnings, the reef grows and develops over hundreds of years, providing support for innumerable animals - yet one storm can threaten the entire community(n)

programme.desc: The comedian makes five train journeys taking in the spectacular sights of Africa, travelling to unexpected places in deserts and forests, villages and cities, and finding out how the railways are used today. programme.desc: It was 30 years after the Romans invaded Britain that they were ready to take on the challenge of conquering the Lake District. With the toughest landscape they had encountered in the nation, peopled by a rebellious tribe, it was no small task, but within a few years, the whole of Lakeland was under their control. Tony Robinson tackles the journey by himself, walking 50 miles from Penrith to Ambleside and on to the Irish Sea at Ravenglass, discovering that the Romans encountered beauty and danger in equal measure(n)

programme.desc: Indian-born chocolate scientist Deepti is first to host in Birmingham, hoping her experimental Asian fusion menu will cause a positive reaction amongst her guests. programme.desc: Four amateur cooks throw dinner parties in and around the Cotswolds - club DJ Daniel, IT operations manager Blanche, party planner Rachel, and actor and musician Kristian(n)

programme.desc: A trio of couples try to outdo each other in Aberdeen, coming up with an Ibizan fiesta, an evening of posh nosh and dinner party classics and a vegetarian-influenced menu(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jack's Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chef's advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert encounters a beautiful woman who learns his surname is Barone and mistakenly assumes he is Raymond - a situation he is quick to turn to his romantic advantage. Brad Garrett stars(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank catches a football at a college game and refuses to give it back. He tries instead to auction it over the radio for $10,000 - much to the horror of Ray, who tries to make him feel guilty for being so mercenary(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin is given the night shift as punishment for refusing to take his boss's sister out on a date, and Frasier becomes jealous of his former agent Bebe's close relationship with a celebrity lifestyle guru. Guest starring Dr Phil McGraw(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin worries he may not be Niles and Frasier's father after noticing their similarities to his wife's former research partner. Meanwhile, Daphne enrols her yet-to-be-conceived child at an exclusive school. Comedy, guest starring David Ogden Stiers(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton go head to head to help Des and Caline May find their dream property. programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Southend open a glamping site in rural France, an Anglo-French couple turn a townhouse into a restaurant, and two ex-army pals build a crazy golf course in Spain(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George gets to celebrate one of his favourite periods of British architecture when he helps out at an arts and crafts Edwardian terrace house in Addiscombe, south London. Cookie and Sophia bought their home six months ago, but, despite it being full to the brim with amazing original features, from fireplaces to balustrades and stained-glass windows. This renovation is a labour of love as the couple set about painstakingly restoring the features by themselves, it needed some serious TLC. George visits the wallpaper library of his all-time design hero William Morris, and tries his hand at block printing(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Harry Hill take on Jon Richardson and Rose Matafeo, while Alex Horne and the Horne Section join Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: Britain's Wildest Weather

Cameras also capture the sheer horror of being swept overboard by a monster wave in the middle of the night(n)

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britain's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. In the first edition, five bodies dating from the Bronze Age are found in a deep pit on the Isle of Thanet in Kent. One of them is an old woman, who has been manipulated into a position where she is pointing at something. But at what? And why?(n)

programme.title: Apocalypse Cow: How Meat Killed the Planet
programme.desc: In this provocative documentary, environmental campaigner George Monbiot examines the disastrous impact that farming animals for meat has had on the planet. Throughout the programme, George looks at alternative food sources, including synthetic meat, and a process that produces protein from just bacteria and air, and also explores revolutionary ideas that could change agriculture as we know it(n)

programme.title: Meat the Family
programme.desc: Four families challenge their meat-eating habits by caring for farm animals in their homes. At the end of three weeks, they must decide whether to save their house guests and send them to a sanctuary or reintroduce them to the food chain - and face the prospect of the animals becoming their dinner. Cynthia, Sam and their daughters find their chicken guests highly entertaining, while Dawn, John, Max and Sam look after two piglets - and as they learn more about pig intelligence they research more about the health implications of processed meat, forcing them to question their entire attitude to what they eat(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are house-hunting for family homes in the West Midlands. Kirstie searches for properties in a family friendly suburb in Birmingham for Emma and Paul, while Phil heads to Solihull with Kate and Dan, who moved up from London 18 months ago to be closer to family and to find a long-term home(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away

programme.desc: Three couples in north London compete to host the best dinner party. programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra, Ray and Amy get trapped at Frank and Marie's house during a snowstorm, but they actually find themselves having a good time - until an unguarded comment alters the mood. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Monica Horan(n)

programme.desc: Ray discovers the leader of local group the Frontier Girls is intending to sell a record number of cookies in his area, and sets out to beat her at her own game. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Amy Aquino(n)

programme.desc: Julia attends a party with Frasier, where she manages to offend the entire Crane family by blurting out the news that Daphne is pregnant. Comedy, guest starring Felicity Hunter, with Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.desc: Ben Hillman attempts to find a dream home in Barbados for husband and wife Julie and John, who have a budget of £300,000(n)

programme.desc: The fiery chef heads to the Seascape restaurant in the village of Islip on Long Island, New York, in a bid to change the fortunes of its owner, who is nearly $1million in debt. programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The programme celebrates the great British breakfast with a look back at some of the UK's favourite brekkie-based investigations, including when Jimmy Doherty traced the roots of baked beans back to the early settlers in America, and solved the puzzle of what kippers actually are. There is also a look at when Matt Tebbutt delved into the surprising science behind why nuts always rise to the top of his muesli, as he discovered how the same principle can save a skier's life in an avalanche(n)

programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts a fresh run of the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. She is followed by 20-year-old Charlie from Oxford, a forensics student who hopes to find his ideal partner in crime(n)

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.desc: Part one of two. Sally thinks Alissa is trying to break up with Tommy so tries to help, while The Big Giant Head and Vicky pay a surprise visit to the aliens and make it very clear the honeymoon is over. William Shatner guest stars(n)

programme.desc: Part two of two. Dick struggles to deal with the revelation that the Big Giant Head is his father, while Vicki pretends to be friendly to Janice and Tommy sulks about his broken relationship with Alissa, for which Sally makes attempts to explain(n)

programme.desc: Nathan asks Grace to marry him, but she declines the proposal because he falls short of her childhood fantasy of the ideal husband. programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will, Karen and Jack unite in an effort to pull Grace out of her depression, but end up feeling dejected themselves when their heartbroken friend points out a few home truths. American sitcom, starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing(n)

programme.desc: Pressure mounts when Boyd ends a competition at a rodeo, while Eve and her boyfriend argue over what she is wearing to the prom. Sitcom, starring Tim Allen, Flynn Morrison and Kaitlyn Dever(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan takes Jake away to move in with his mother, after having an argument with Charlie over a decorative bowl. Robert Wagner guest stars, alongside Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer(n)

Blackpool lettings agent John comes up against a hard drug user who is attracting antisocial wrongdoers to the bedsits that John runs, while in Leicestershire, Sharon battles to reclaim a property from a former friend who is close to £3,500 in arrears with rent(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. programme.desc: The abduction of a wealthy man and his daughter grabs Sherlock's attention, with the voice issuing the ransom demand sounding suspiciously familiar. programme.desc: The comedian takes over the science programme in a special episode for BBC's sitcom season, turning it into a chat show with eminent scientists as guests.
